parsed_review.summary: CP00-578 is a descriptor-only Risk-A pack (10 units, RP18.P07.M05.S21-S30, micro "Permission And Audit Binding") and is the live plan cursor in closeout-pack-plan.json. The contract p07_permission_audit_slice_descriptor, registry constants (CP578_PACK_BINDING/_REQUIREMENTS/_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION), service.js builders, validators.js, README, and model.test.js are mutually consistent; index.js wildcard re-exports surface the 7 required exports (hence it is a ref but unmodified). The validator enforces 10-unit coverage in RP18.P07.M05, per-row descriptor_only=true/runtime_execution=false/customer_safe_errors_only=true/raw_payload_included=false, authority boundary, no-write attestation, handoff to CP00-579/RP18.P07.M06.S01, and contract-vs-generated deepEqual; tests assert the same. Source modules contain no I/O, runtime, DB, network, process.env, or eval. Pack-level production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false are correct with no overclaim; Hermes production_ready_candidate=true is descriptor-coverage candidacy only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, no_write receipt shape), used solely for deterministic review packet/receipt handling rather than product runtime. Claude remains a read-only, non-final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human final approval required for CP00-579 runtime opening). Auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1456-byte stdout) with no prior invalid attempts; command-evidence attests all required validations (closeout-pack-plan:validate, npm test, validate, build, rp18:ai-legal-workflows-core:validate, git diff --check, etc.) passed before review. The post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are legitimately absent at this stage and are produced after this review per the hardening sequence. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, LDIP invalid-attempt, workbook/*) are correctly excluded from pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; no gates weakened.
